## Anti-list check

listbull is intentionally narrow. Before opening, check
docs/architecture-overview.md "Anti-list" — features that turn it
into project-management software (multi-assignee, custom workflows,
Gantt, time tracking, etc.) are out of scope.

- [ ] My request stays in the "Telegram-native AI list assistant"
      wedge
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for duplicates
